frame_analyses.description: Single instrument visible approaching red foam appendage suspended in trainer. Loop deployment mechanism ready.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Expert positioning of instrument; appendage clearly visible and accessible

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Coordinated bimanual technique; one hand stabilizing target, other deploying loop—excellent ergonomic control

frame_analyses.description: Loop being advanced toward marked target line on appendage. Instruments maintaining steady position.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth, controlled advancement; no jerky movements; appendage remains stable in foam bed

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around appendage at marked target line. Both instruments maintaining tension.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears centered on mark; no visible deviation from target position

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Controlled cinching; loop tightening evenly; no slippage visible

frame_analyses.description: Loop fully cinched around appendage at marked line. Tight constriction visible.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop completely secured; no gap or movement evident; appendage still intact

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precise positioning for tail cutting; loop remains firmly cinched during cutting phase

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cut; minimal disturbance to loop positioning

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Excellent overall execution; loop positioned accurately at mark; tight cinch; no appendage transection

frame_analyses.description: Wide-angle view of completed task. Red balloon (model) and foam appendage visible with loop successfully deployed and secured.

cinch_assessment.notes: Loop fully cinched with no visible gap or movement

confidence_rationale: Video clearly shows expert execution with excellent visualization throughout. Loop placement at marked target line confirmed visually; cinch security evident; appendage integrity preserved. Completion time well within expert range (20-40s). Only minor uncertainty is exact pixel-level deviation at mark, but appears to be zero deviation based on clear visual alignment.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance demonstrating textbook endoloop technique. Rapid, controlled deployment with bimanual coordination. Loop positioned precisely at marked target line with immediate, secure cinching. Clean tail cutdown. Total performance time 24.5s—well within expert benchmark.
strengths: Excellent bimanual coordination—one hand stabilizing while the other deploys
Smooth, controlled advancement of loop with no jerky movements
Loop positioned accurately at marked target line
Tight, secure cinch with no visible slippage
Efficient tail cutting without disturbing loop position

demonstrated_techniques: Bimanual instrument control with stabilization and deployment roles
Smooth loop advancement over tissue without rushing
Proper cinching technique under controlled tension
Clean suture tail cutdown without loop displacement
common_errors_addressed: Avoids rapid uncontrolled loop advancement that could cause tissue injury
Demonstrates proper loop placement at exact mark—not proximal or distal deviation
Shows secure cinching technique preventing loop slippage after deployment
Prevents appendage transection by maintaining tissue integrity during cinch phase

improvement_suggestions: This is an expert demonstration with no meaningful improvement opportunities
